title: SQL: "CREATE VIEW AS SELECT 1;" fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.50);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE value > 5.00;
CREATE VIEW test_view_null AS SELECT id, name, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(50)) AS description FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: CREATE VIEW statement with SELECT fails
